description: Perform an Exploratory Factor Analysis (EFA) on the Big Five Personality Traits dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv. Include all numeric personality variables in the analysis using Principal Axis Factoring extraction, Oblimin rotation, and Parallel Analysis for factor retention. The analysis must include a scree plot, factor loadings table, factor correlations, and a path diagram. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFive_EFA.jasp and create a text summary at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/efa_report.txt stating the number of factors found, the extraction method used, and the rotation method used.
